issue: Boolean renders as "true improved" instead of "Matchup trending better"
No deck-specific coaching insight on deck detail page — player goes there expecting analysis of their deck
player_impact: Player must navigate to /review for deck coaching
recommendation: Add deck-specific buildPrimaryDeckInsight to deck detail page using deck-filtered matches

player_impact: Reduces UX quality of most-used flow
recommendation: Profile server-side data fetching; consider parallel supabase queries or reducing coach computation on this page

issue: SessionCoachPanel appears before Coach says hero — two coaching surfaces compete for attention
player_impact: Player unsure which coaching is the primary recommendation
recommendation: Demote SessionCoachPanel on review page; rename label or collapse it to "Current mission context"

issue: Per-matchup badge says "Actionable leak" but "priority watchlist" is the product language elsewhere
recommendation: Change getMatchupCoachLabel to return "Priority watchlist" for losing matchups

issue: 5 secondary insight cards below Coach says hero — all equal visual weight
player_impact: Players may feel overwhelmed or scan past key insights
recommendation: Show 3 cards, hide remaining behind "Show more insights" expander

issue: Filter panel visible by default on all screen sizes — page starts below the fold content
player_impact: Players must scroll past filters to reach match list
recommendation: Default filters to collapsed with a "Filter" toggle button; preserve active filter count in the button label

issue: Deck coaching card is below the fold on many screens — players may not see it
player_impact: Key coaching feedback missed on first view
recommendation: Move deck coaching card above the KPI row or integrate into the mission hero panel

issue: Post-log reward doesn't tell player what the just-logged game contributed to their coaching pattern
player_impact: Misses motivation moment — player doesn't know if the game mattered
recommendation: Add a "This game added to your Item Lock pattern" or "Good Tech signal strengthened" message after save

issue: Per-matchup action text is generic for all matchups ("Keep logging and tag every loss")
player_impact: Action text doesn't vary by actual win rate or pattern
recommendation: Vary action text based on `coachLabel.action` which already differs; ensure text references specific data (e.g. tag names)

issue: SessionCoachPanel visible on log-game page mid-flow — distracts from the task of logging
player_impact: Player interrupted by analysis while trying to record data
recommendation: Collapse or hide SessionCoachPanel on /matches/new by default; show post-log reward instead

issue: What this page does card is always visible — noise for returning users
player_impact: Returning players see help text they already understand
recommendation: Make collapsible or show only for first 3 visits (localStorage flag)

issue: Charts and tables inside "More insights" are rarely needed and add noise
player_impact: Page feels heavy on first open
recommendation: Consider removing charts entirely or linking to /review instead of rendering inline

issue: 25 match rows is a heavy scroll — especially on mobile
recommendation: Reduce default page size to 10 on mobile viewports; or add virtual scroll

issue: 6-input filter form stacks taller than one viewport on mobile
player_impact: Mobile players must scroll past the filter to reach the matchup breakdown
recommendation: Collapse filter form on mobile with "Show filters" button
